name: IdsDmMbrshDmFmlyAccumDedctExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD,SUB_UNIQ_KEY,YR_NO,DEDCT_VRBL_CD,DEDCT_VRBL_SEQ_NO,DEDCT_LMT_NTWK_CD,DRUG_ACCUM_IN,ACCUM_AMT,FMLY_DEDCT_AMT,ACCUM_NO,DEDCT_VRBL_DESC,PROD_ACCUM_ID,CAROVR_AMT,FMLY_DEDCT_CAROVR_AMT,PLN_YR_EFF_DT,PLN_YR_END_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_FMLY_ACCUM_DEDCT FMLY_DEDCT WHERE FMLY_DEDCT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT cte.SRC_SYS_CD,cte.SUB_UNIQ_KEY,cte.YR_NO,cte.DEDCT_VRBL_CD,cte.DEDCT_VRBL_SEQ_NO,cte.DEDCT_LMT_NTWK_CD,cte.DRUG_ACCUM_IN,cte.ACCUM_AMT,cte.FMLY_DEDCT_AMT,cte.ACCUM_NO,cte.DEDCT_VRBL_DESC,@{pipeline().parameters.DataMartRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO,cte.PROD_ACCUM_ID,cte.CAROVR_AMT,cte.FMLY_DEDCT_CAROVR_AMT,CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(char(10), cte.PLN_YR_EFF_DT, 120) + ' 00:00:00.000',120) AS PLN_YR_EFF_DT,CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(char(10), cte.PLN_YR_END_DT, 120) + ' 00:00:00.000',120) AS PLN_YR_END_DT FROM cte

Annotations:
Write MBRSH_DM_FMLY_ACCUM_DEDCT Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmProdDmDedctCmpntLoad.
Read all the Data from IDS P_FMLY_ACCUM_DEDCT Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO
Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmFmlyAccumDedctExtr
